pattern: Tether cleared before agent state update enables double execution after crash
decision: False positive. handleOrphanedWorking (sentinel.go:1116-1127) checks item.Status == 'tethered' before reopening, and explicitly skips writs with status 'done' (the state after a successful resolve). The Resolve ordering is intentional and the comment at resolve.go:324-327 documents the rationale.

pattern: GenerateClaudeMD does not normalize empty Kind field where other generators do
decision: False positive. isCodeKind() at claudemd.go:43-45 already treats empty string as 'code' (returns kind == "" || kind == "code"). Empty Kind produces identical output to Kind="code". The asymmetry with other generators is cosmetic, not behavioral.

pattern: UpdateWrit allows status transition to 'closed' without setting closed_at, unlike CloseWrit
decision: No production caller uses UpdateWrit to set status='closed'. All close paths use CloseWrit. API gap is defense-in-depth, not an active bug.

pattern: EnsureAgent race condition between GetAgent and CreateAgent returns spurious combined error
decision: Only called by consul and sentinel: single-process daemons with PID-file guards. No practical concurrency window exists in production.

pattern: DailySpendByAccount in forge WorldStore interface widens dependency surface beyond forge's direct needs
decision: Transitive dependency required by budget.CheckAccountBudget, which is called from forge patrol and orchestrator. Interface width is a consequence of budget-check integration, not an accident.

pattern: Backoff counter never advances when startup.ConfigFor returns nil, causing infinite retry loop
decision: All production roles have startup configs registered. The nil-config path is unreachable in normal operation. Adding a role without registering startup config would be caught during development.

pattern: infrastructureSessions list contains sol-chronicle and sol-broker which are now PID-managed, not tmux sessions
decision: Stale entries add 2 items to the known-session map that never match any real tmux session. Zero behavioral impact: does not prevent orphan detection or cause false positives in session cleanup.
Intentional for automation use case. Safety is provided by TryCloseCaravan which only closes caravans where all items are merged. The --confirm requirement applies to manual close path.

pattern: Chronicle WriteHeartbeat does not ensure .runtime/ directory exists before writing
decision: .runtime/ directory is always created by prefect (cmd/prefect.go, cmd/up.go) before chronicle starts. Chronicle is supervised by prefect. The directory existence is guaranteed by startup ordering.

pattern: Redundant RemoveHeartbeat() call when defer already covers all return paths
decision: Harmless defensive coding. os.Remove on non-existent file returns nil. The defer covers all paths; the explicit call is redundant but not incorrect.
